name: Robot vacuums
summary: Autonomous robotic vacuum cleaners, $200-$1600 range, with and without mopping and self-empty base stations.

evidence.claim: Suction is measured in Pascals (Pa); 2000 Pa is adequate for hard floors, 4000+ Pa is needed for medium-pile carpet, 6000+ Pa for thick carpet and pet hair.
Mopping feature on most robot vacuums is a wet cloth dragged behind the vacuum; it does not scrub. True scrubbing requires vibrating or rotating mop heads, present only on ~20% of mop-capable models.
LIDAR/VSLAM navigation accuracy is substantially higher than gyroscope-based random-pattern navigation; LIDAR models cover a room in 30-40% less time.

criteria.name: suction_pa
criteria.notes: Hard floor: 2000+. Medium carpet: 4000+. Thick carpet/pet hair: 6000+ (E1).

criteria.name: mopping
criteria.notes: Only vibrating or rotating mops meaningfully scrub (E2); cloth-drag is damp wiping.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Most 'mop' features are damp cloth drag (E2) — useful for quick wipes but not scrubbing. 'Professional' level requires vibrating or rotating pads.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the mopping mechanism vibrate or rotate, or is it a static wet pad dragged?

confabulationPatterns.reality: All robot vacuums get stuck on cables, high-pile rugs, and raised thresholds. Marketing claims of 'obstacle avoidance' are typically 60-80% effective, not 100%.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the product claim obstacle avoidance? If so, check independent review stuck-rate data.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Without a Pa figure, this claim is meaningless. Always demand the numeric value (E1).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Is a Pa figure cited? If not, flag the claim as unverifiable.

counterfeitSignals.signal: Roborock S8 Pro Ultra listed below $1200

compatibilityQuestions: Do you have pets? Hair tangles in many lower-end models.
What's the carpet pile depth in your highest-traffic room? Influences suction requirement.

repairability.notes: Roborock and iRobot have better parts markets. Cheap brands on Amazon are replace-don't-repair.
